name: flowrunner-visualizer-island
description: Self-contained Vite/React island that renders the FlowRunner flow model with React Flow (@xyflow/react). Builds to a single same-origin IIFE bundle in assets/visualizer-island/, loaded behind the reactFlowVisualizer.js facade (docs/visualizer-contract.md). FLAG-GATED alternative to the default Drawflow engine (flowVisualizer.js). See docs/engine-decision.md.
